pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.7.6 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag for modern Java compilation.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in all configurations, using @Serial is the standard migration pattern for Java 17+ to explicitly mark serialization fields, replacing the implicit convention.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation to support Java 21 serialization best practices.
Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to explicitly mark it as a serialization field, satisfying Java 21 strictness.
Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices.
Add import for java.io.Serial annotation to support Java 21 serialization best practices.
Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to explicitly mark it as a serialization field, satisfying Java 21 strictness.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Use pattern matching for instanceof to simplify exception handling code.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.before:
if (e instanceof BmcException) {
                        BmcException error = (BmcException) e;

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/confi.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Replace List.remove(int index) with List.removeFirst() to explicitly remove the head element, leveraging Java 6+ Deque/List interface enhancements for clarity.
